ControlLocation.description: Where Fabric control code runs relative to the environment.

oneOf.description: Fabric runs on the host/control plane and starts or connects to the harness in the environment.
Fabric runs inside the prepared environment with the harness.

EnvironmentOwnership.description: Whether Fabric owns the underlying environment resource.

oneOf.description: The caller or a surrounding system owns the environment resource.
Fabric created or leased the environment resource and may release it.

artifacts.description: Artifact root visible to the harness runtime.

env.description: Environment variables visible to the harness and its tools.

ownership.description: Whether Fabric owns the environment resource.

workspace.description: Workspace visible to the harness runtime.
